transcript.text:
There's a place that specialized in Kimchi Fried Rice for 20 years!
[Have you heard of a Kimchi Fried Rice restaurant?!]
[That's all they specialize in]
[This is it]
[Mix it up with eggs]
[All gone]
[I'm terrified]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Gunja-dong today
There's a place that specialized in only Kimchi Fried Rice
I've seen kimchi fried rice served at a lot of diners
But not one that specializes that one specific dish
[Ttoraeggiri] [Seoul, Gwangjin-gu]
[It looks like a Chinese cuisine from the outside]
[Let's go]
The menu...

They specialize in Kimchi Fried RIce
So 3 orders of that?
It looks like a bunsik (snack diner)
I've never heard of a place that specializes in kimchi fried rice
[Her first time here]
[We somehow ended up focusing on kimchi fried rice]
3 orders of Kimchi Fried Rice,
-1 sausage stew -We don't serve that anymore
We got rid of it
1 soft tofu stew and steamed egg
-That's a lot -How about 4?
Our portions are huge
3 kimchi fried rice, 2 steamed egg, 1 soft tofu stew, please
It's a lot less than what I'm used to
[Kimchi Fried Rice ready to go]
[Explosive Steamed Egg]

[Soft Tofu Stew]
[Meal served]
Thank you
[Huge portions!]
[Other dishes to go with the fried rice]
You can just smell the fried rice right when it's served And it smells so nice
Bon appetit
A restaurant that specializes in Kimchi Fried Rice
I wonder how it will taste
Hold up
That's so good
It's been such a long time since I've had something like this
It's not too sweet
A little bit of sweetness
The rice is not too sticky It spreads out well
Full of flavor and a little bit of sweetness

The flavors are crazy
Something that everyone would enjoy
This is all they probably ordered
It has meat, kimchi,
A little bit of soft tofu
Egg, egg, egg Egg yolk
This is very nostalgic
Something that brings back old memories
Noodles?
It has chewy noodles in here In soft tofu stew
I was planning on doing a mukbang for this dish And it's here
It's like Tteokboki But it's like Gochujang Stew and like Soft Tofu Stew
I've already spilled some
Good thing I wore black
It cooled down a little It was puffed up when it was served
I should've taken a bite when it was fresh

I can taste smokey flavors
I can taste the smokiness from the eggs
I love the smell
Let's try it like this
That's really good
This could be on the menu
The meat is chewy and nice
How about the kimchi?
Of course It's delicious
That's why the fried rice is good
[Tzu... Tzuyang?] [Huh?!]
This is near Sejong University
I go to restaurants that are popular on campus
But there are a lot of good restaurants on campus
Maybe because of the college students They give you this much for so little
Very cost-efficient

The combination of the steamed egg and the fried rice is amazing
[Steamed egg and Kimchi Fried RIce...]
I'm loving the flavors of the steamed egg
The portions are huge
I'm not getting sick of it
It's going away so quickly because it's so good
My parents used to make me kimchi fried rice very often
At least once a week
This is bringing me back a lot of good memories
Homemade kimchi fried rice And it's tasty
I want to wrap it with dried seaweed
I can eat endlessly if there's fried seaweed
100 servings? Okay maybe not...
I want some dried seaweed
Is there a convenience store here?
[I can't stop...]

I got permission from the owner to bring my own dried seaweed Since it would go so well together
With kimchi fried rice
I will have to let him know that this is a must here
This is going to be great!
With dried seaweed
This is it!
This is the best
With some seaweed paper
Right on top
Rather than wrapping it, Just like this
Spill a lot though
I thought they spread it out on the bottom,
But they served a lot of rice here
I want to be a student again
Back when I was a student...
[The mic battery miraculously went out...]

[Bye]
Steamed egg too
A little moist
And not watery
Good for dried seaweed
It'd be good, right? It's a first
That's so good
Dried seaweed goes well with everything
All Koreans love it
Just dried seaweed and kimchi
The ambiance is not because it's all college students
I feel like I was just a college student too though...
When did I get so old?
I feel like I'm the oldest one here
I feel like it was just yesterday
3 dried seaweed

This tastes so good
No, really
Some steamed egg
Look at it steaming
The restaurant is packed right now
I feel like I'm on the spot
I'm the only old lady among all the young college students
[Feeling her age]
I spilled everything
There's a big grill there and the owner is grilling there all-day
[There's a reason why it's popular]
I feel like an ajumma now (old lady)
I need to stop coming to college students' spots
I used to eat at convenience stores when I was in school because of low funds
Or like instant foods
I only remember eating during my school days

I miss college...
Should I make a visit while I'm here?
Why am I even here?
The food is really good, but...
I'm losing my appetite
I'll have this to-go It's really good
I don't think I can eat more here
So good...
It's very savory
The rice is non-sticky
Full of flavors
The kimchi itself tastes so good
The Korean-way
Eating kimchi fried rice while eating kimchi stew
That's good
Delicious

It's like an egg pastry
We serve bigger portions
Like, a lot
I can't even finish 1 plate
[Finishing up the soft tofu stew]
Excuse me
Can I get 3 orders of Large kimchi fried rice to-go?
I'm going to eat more at home
[Finished]
[Every little grain of rice]
This didn't fill me up, but I will eat more at home
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
